
### reassociation 



* with pipelined, 5-cycle latency multiplier; how long does each take to compute?
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/ooo/texfig/reassocDataFlow.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/reassocDataFlow.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/reassocDataFlow.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/reassocDataFlow.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/ooo/texfig/reassocDataFlow.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::
